bench: DeepSWE SWE-bench-style full113 (Path A: qwen-code CLI agent)
agent_behavior_note: Instruct-2507 produced a captured patch on ~half of tasks; the rest are no-patch from exploration loops (repeated glob/read until max turns), 262144-ctx overflow ([API Error: 400 no body] after greedy multi-file reads), or narrated 'done' with zero edits. Scaffold identical to Coder; edits that occur ARE captured (proven per-sample). This is genuine Instruct behavior, not a harness bug.

audit_phase.note: mode=audit makes NO serving generation calls; probes only confirm :30000 still served Instruct-2507 weights

zero_is_real_not_a_judging_bug.claim: The 0 is genuine agent-capability failure, not a scoring/environment bug.
proof: gold_valid=106: gold solution passes the exact verifier (reward=1) -> judging env correct.
On those SAME 106 tasks agent_reward!=1 for every one -> 0/106.
The 7 gold_broken excluded from the valid denom so they cannot explain the 0.
Per-sample: agent really ran on :30000 Instruct-2507 and (when it edits) produced substantial patches that fail the same verifier gold passes.
